steps.label: Initial Report Details Entry
steps.description: On this screen, you will enter the initial details of a new intake report. Please provide as much information as possible about the report, including the date and time it was received, the method of intake, and a brief summary of the situation. Guidance is provided for each field to help you accurately capture the required information. All required fields are marked. Review your entries before proceeding. This is the first step in the intake process and helps establish the context for the case.

fields.label: Date Report Received
fields.error_message: Date and time report received is required.

data_validation: Date Report Received cannot be in the future
Time Report Received must be a valid time format
Intake Worker Name and ID must match logged-in user
If Intake Method is 'Other', Additional Notes must be provided
Summary of Report must be at least 20 characters

buttons.label: Next
buttons.description: Proceed to the next step after entering all required report details.

buttons.label: Cancel
buttons.description: Cancel the intake process and return to the dashboard.

actions.name: Validate Initial Report Details, Save Data, and Initiate Prior History Search
actions.implementation: Validate all required initial report fields (date/time, intake method, report source, urgency, summary, etc.) according to field and business rules. If validation passes, save the entered data to the backend, then initiate prior history search via STEP_2. If validation fails, display specific error messages for each invalid or missing field and prevent navigation. If prior history search fails, display error message and allow user to retry or return.

errorHandling.onValidationFail: Display validation errors for missing or incorrect fields, including business/data integrity rules.
errorHandling.onSearchError: Display error message from prior history search and prevent navigation. Allow retry or return.

actions.name: Cancel Intake Process
actions.implementation: Prompt user for confirmation. If confirmed, cancel the intake process and return to dashboard. Warn user about unsaved data loss. If navigation fails, display error.

errorHandling.onCancelFail: Display error if unable to navigate to dashboard.

steps.label: Search Prior History
steps.description: Defines the process for searching agency records to identify any prior involvement of the child and household members. On user action, the system queries the agency database for previous reports, ongoing cases, and historical patterns related to the child and household members. The results are displayed to the intake worker, including case numbers, dates, and outcomes.

rules.label: Initiate Prior History Search
rules.logic: When the intake worker clicks the 'Search Prior History' button, the system initiates a query to the agency database using identifiers for the child and household members.

rules.label: Handle Database Query Errors
rules.logic: If the database query returns an error (e.g., status = 'error'), display the error message (from 'message' field) to the intake worker and prevent display of prior history results.

rules.label: Display Prior History Results
rules.logic: If the query is successful (status != 'error'), display all matching prior reports, ongoing cases, and historical patterns, including case numbers, dates, and outcomes.

actions.name: Initiate and Display Prior History Search Results
actions.triggerCondition: Triggered by RULE_STEP_1_VALIDATE_AND_SEARCH or user action.
actions.implementation: Query agency database for child and household members' previous reports, ongoing cases, and historical patterns. If query is successful, display results (case numbers, dates, outcomes) and allow user to proceed to STEP_3_1. If query fails, display error message and provide options to retry or return to STEP_1.

errorHandling.onQueryError: Display error message and provide options to retry or return to previous step.

steps.label: Intake Data Entry and Review
steps.description: This ScreenQueue guides the Intake Worker through the complete intake process, including entry of child and household member information, allegations and reporter details, and a final review and validation of all intake data before submission.

sequenceLogic.skipLogic: Screens are presented in strict order; skipping is not allowed except if workflow is cancelled or user is not eligible.

quick_action_buttons.label: Print
quick_action_buttons.description: Prints a summary of the entire intake data entry and review process for record-keeping or offline review.

quick_action_buttons.label: Export PDF
quick_action_buttons.description: Exports the full intake data entry and review summary as a PDF document for download or sharing.

screens.label: Child and Household Member Information Entry
screens.description: On this screen, you will enter detailed information about the child and all household members involved in the intake. Please provide accurate and complete details for each person. You can add multiple household members as needed. Guidance is provided for each field, and you will be prompted if any required information is missing or inconsistent. Review the entered data before proceeding to ensure accuracy.

fields.label: Phone Number
fields.error_message: Phone Number must be valid format.

data_validation: Cannot have more than one mother or father listed as household members.
Birth date cannot be in the future.
SSN must be unique among all household members.
Phone number must be valid format.
If Relationship to Child is 'Mother' or 'Father', gender must be consistent.
No duplicate household member entries (same first name, last name, and date of birth).

buttons.label: Next
buttons.description: Proceed to enter allegations and reporter details.

header_buttons.label: Home
header_buttons.description: Navigate to the dashboard home screen.

navigation_config.confirm_message: Are you sure you want to leave? Unsaved data will be lost.

header_buttons.label: Back
header_buttons.description: Go back to the previous page or section.

header_buttons.label: Help
header_buttons.description: Open help documentation for intake entry.

header_buttons.label: User Profile
header_buttons.description: View and edit your user profile.

footer_buttons.label: Next
footer_buttons.description: Proceed to enter allegations and reporter details.

workflow_steps.description: Validate all required child and household member fields.

error_message: Please complete all required fields and resolve validation errors.

workflow_steps.description: Navigate to the Allegations and Reporter Information Entry screen.

business_rules.rule_description: SSN must be unique among all household members.
business_rules.error_message: SSN must be unique among all household members.

business_rules.rule_description: No duplicate household member entries (same first name, last name, and date of birth).

cross_field_validation.validation_logic: If Relationship to Child is 'Mother', gender must be 'Female'; if 'Father', gender must be 'Male'
cross_field_validation.error_message: Gender must be consistent with relationship to child.

data_format_rules.format_description: SSN must be in the format XXX-XX-XXXX

screens.label: Allegations and Reporter Information Entry
screens.description: On this screen, you will record all allegations related to the intake and provide information about the person making the report. You can add multiple allegations if needed. Please ensure all required fields are completed and that the information is as specific as possible. Guidance is provided for each field, and you will be prompted if any required information is missing or inconsistent.

fields.label: Date of Alleged Incident
fields.error_message: Date of Alleged Incident must be valid.

fields.label: Reporter Relationship to Child
fields.error_message: Reporter Relationship to Child is required.

fields.label: Reporter Phone Number
fields.error_message: Reporter Phone Number must be valid format.

fields.label: May we contact the reporter?
fields.error_message: Please indicate if the reporter may be contacted.

data_validation: At least one allegation must be entered.
Alleged Victim and Alleged Perpetrator cannot be the same person.
Date of Alleged Incident cannot be in the future.
If Reporter Relationship is 'Anonymous', Reporter Name and Contact fields must be blank.
Phone number must be valid format.

buttons.label: Previous
buttons.description: Return to child and household details entry.

buttons.label: Next
buttons.description: Proceed to review and validate all entered intake information.

header_buttons.label: Home
header_buttons.description: Navigate to the dashboard home screen.

navigation_config.confirm_message: Are you sure you want to leave? Unsaved data will be lost.

header_buttons.label: Back
header_buttons.description: Go back to the previous page or section.

header_buttons.label: Help
header_buttons.description: Open help documentation for allegations and reporter entry.

header_buttons.label: User Profile
header_buttons.description: View and edit your user profile.

footer_buttons.label: Previous
footer_buttons.description: Return to child and household details entry.

workflow_steps.description: Save current allegations and reporter data.
Navigate to the Child and Household Member Information Entry screen.

footer_buttons.label: Next
footer_buttons.description: Proceed to review and validate all entered intake information.

workflow_steps.description: Validate all required allegation and reporter fields.

error_message: Please complete all required fields and resolve validation errors.

workflow_steps.description: Navigate to the Review and Validate Intake Information screen.

required_fields.error_message: Reporter Relationship to Child is required.
Please indicate if the reporter may be contacted.

business_rules.rule_description: At least one allegation must be entered.
business_rules.error_message: At least one allegation must be entered.

business_rules.rule_description: Alleged Victim and Alleged Perpetrator cannot be the same person.
business_rules.error_message: Alleged Victim and Perpetrator cannot be the same person.

business_rules.rule_description: If Reporter Relationship is 'Anonymous', Reporter Name and Contact fields must be blank.
business_rules.condition: if reporter_relationship == 'Anonymous' then reporter_name == '' && reporter_phone == '' && reporter_address == ''
business_rules.error_message: Reporter Name and Contact fields must be blank for anonymous reporters.

cross_field_validation.error_message: Alleged Victim and Perpetrator cannot be the same person.

screens.label: Review and Validate Intake Information
screens.description: This screen allows you to review all information entered for the intake, including child and household details, allegations, and reporter information. Carefully check each section for accuracy and completeness. You may navigate back to previous screens to make corrections if needed. Once you confirm all information is correct, you can proceed to submit the intake. A summary of all data is displayed for your final review.

fields.label: I have reviewed all information and confirm it is accurate to the best of my knowledge.
fields.error_message: You must confirm the information is accurate before submitting.

data_validation: All required fields in previous steps must be completed.
No validation errors present in any section.
Acknowledgment checkbox must be checked before submission.

buttons.label: Previous
buttons.description: Return to allegations and reporter details entry.

buttons.label: Submit Intake
buttons.description: Submit the intake for processing after confirming all information is correct.

header_buttons.label: User Profile

workflow_steps.description: Navigate to the Allegations and Reporter Information Entry screen.

footer_buttons.label: Submit Intake
footer_buttons.description: Submit the intake for processing after confirming all information is correct.

required_fields.error_message: You must confirm the information is accurate before submitting.

business_rules.rule_description: All required fields in previous steps must be completed.
business_rules.error_message: Please complete all required fields before submitting.

ACTION_1.name: Open Help Modal
ACTION_1.implementation: Opens a modal window with help documentation relevant to the current screen.

ACTION_2.name: Validate and Save Data
ACTION_2.implementation: Validates all required fields and saves the current screen data to the backend.

ACTION_3.name: Navigate to Screen
ACTION_3.implementation: Navigates to the specified screen in the intake workflow.

steps.label: Submit Intake
steps.description: Process for the Intake Worker to submit the completed intake for disposition. Upon clicking 'Submit Intake', the system must validate all entered data, ensure required fields are completed, save the intake record, log an audit trail of the submission, and transition the workflow to the disposition decision step.

assignments.label: Submit Intake
assignments.logic: When the Intake Worker clicks the 'Submit Intake' button, the system performs data validation on all intake fields. If validation passes, the system saves the intake record, logs the submission event in the audit trail, and advances the workflow to the disposition decision step. If validation fails, the system displays error messages and prevents submission until all issues are resolved.

actions.name: Validate and Submit Intake Record, Log Audit Trail, and Transition to Manual Review
actions.implementation: Validate all intake fields, save the intake record, log the submission event in the audit trail, and transition to STEP_5 for manual review and confirmation. If validation fails, display errors and prevent submission. After manual review in STEP_5, transition to disposition decision (STEP_6).

errorHandling.onValidationFail: Display validation errors and prevent submission.

steps.label: Review Intake Submission
steps.description: Intake Worker must review and confirm the submitted intake for disposition. This includes verifying that all required data fields are completed, data validation rules are met, and the audit trail is properly logged. The worker should ensure that all information is accurate and ready for disposition decision.

completionConditions.logic: Intake Worker must manually review all entered intake data, confirm data validation, and ensure audit trail is logged before marking the task as complete.

actions.name: Manual Review and Confirmation of Intake Submission
actions.implementation: Intake Worker manually reviews all entered intake data, confirms data validation, and ensures audit trail is logged. If confirmed, mark review complete and transition to STEP_6 for disposition decision. If issues are found, allow navigation back to relevant screens for correction.

errorHandling.onReviewFail: Display error if unable to confirm review or navigate for corrections.

actions.name: Save Data and Return to Initial Report Details for Correction
actions.implementation: Save current review data before navigating to STEP_1 for corrections. If navigation fails, display error.

errorHandling.onNavigationFail: Display error if unable to navigate to initial report details entry.

steps.label: Disposition Decision
steps.description: Specifies the decision process for determining if the intake report meets statutory and agency criteria for investigation or assessment. The intake worker must review all relevant information and select either 'Screen In' (assign for investigation/assessment) or 'Screen Out' (no further action). A rationale for the decision is required.

rules.label: Validate Intake Submission
rules.logic: Upon submission, the system checks for errors (status = 'error'). If an error is present, display the error message (from 'message' field) and prevent further processing.

rules.label: Enforce Disposition Selection
rules.logic: Require the intake worker to select a disposition option: 'Screen In' or 'Screen Out'.

rules.label: Require Rationale
rules.logic: Require the intake worker to enter a rationale for the disposition decision before allowing submission.

actions.name: Validate Disposition Decision and Route Intake
actions.implementation: Validate that a disposition ('Screen In' or 'Screen Out') is selected and rationale is provided. If neither disposition is selected or rationale is missing, display error and prevent routing. If validation passes, route intake to STEP_7 (Screen In) or STEP_9 (Screen Out) as appropriate.

errorHandling.onValidationFail: Display error message for missing disposition or rationale. Prevent routing until both are provided.

steps.label: Assign to Supervisor
steps.description: Process for the Intake Worker to assign a screened-in intake to a supervisor for review and approval. The system must route the intake record to the appropriate supervisor, restrict access based on user roles and permissions, and notify the supervisor of the pending review.

assignments.label: Assign to Supervisor
assignments.logic: After the intake is screened in, the system routes the intake record to the designated supervisor for review and approval. Access to the intake record is restricted to users with supervisor roles and appropriate permissions. The system generates a notification to inform the supervisor of the new assignment.

actions.name: Assign Screened-In Intake to Supervisor, Notify, and Handle Notification Failures
actions.triggerCondition: Intake is screened in and disposition submitted.
actions.implementation: Route screened-in intake record to designated supervisor for review and approval. Restrict access to users with supervisor roles and permissions. Generate notification (email, in-app, push) to inform supervisor of new assignment. If assignment or notification fails, display error and allow retry or escalate to system administrator.

errorHandling.onAssignmentFail: Display error message and allow retry. If notification fails, log the failure, display error, and allow retry or escalate.

notification.message: You have a new screened-in intake assigned for review.

steps.label: Supervisor Review of Screened-In Intake
steps.description: Supervisor must review the assigned screened-in intake record for approval. The system must enforce access permissions so only authorized supervisors can access the record. Supervisor should verify all intake details, ensure statutory and agency criteria are met, and approve or request further information as needed.

completionConditions.logic: Supervisor must manually review the screened-in intake record, confirm all criteria are met, and approve or request additional information. Task is complete when supervisor approval is recorded in the system.

actions.name: Supervisor Review and Approval of Screened-In Intake
actions.triggerCondition: Supervisor accesses assigned intake in STEP_8.
actions.implementation: Supervisor reviews assigned screened-in intake record, verifies all details and statutory/agency criteria, and approves or requests further information. On approval, mark task complete, log approval in audit trail, and notify intake worker of approval. If supervisor requests more information, notify intake worker, return intake for correction, and log the request. If review or closure fails, display error and allow retry or escalate to system administrator.

errorHandling.onReviewFail: Display error message and allow retry. If supervisor requests more information, ensure notification is sent and intake is returned for correction. If notification fails, log the failure and escalate.

notification.message: Screened-in intake has been reviewed. Approval or further information requested. Intake worker notified of outcome.

steps.label: Assign to Supervisor (Screened Out)
steps.description: Process for the Intake Worker to assign a screened-out intake to a supervisor for review and closure. The system must route the intake record to the appropriate supervisor, restrict access based on user roles and permissions, and notify the supervisor of the pending closure.

assignments.label: Assign to Supervisor (Screened Out)
assignments.logic: After the intake is screened out, the system routes the intake record to the designated supervisor for review and closure. Access to the intake record is restricted to users with supervisor roles and appropriate permissions. The system generates a notification to inform the supervisor of the new assignment for closure.

actions.name: Assign Screened-Out Intake to Supervisor, Notify, and Handle Notification Failures
actions.triggerCondition: Intake is screened out and disposition submitted.
actions.implementation: Route screened-out intake record to designated supervisor for review and closure. Restrict access to users with supervisor roles and permissions. Generate notification (email, in-app) to inform supervisor of new assignment for closure. If assignment or notification fails, display error and allow retry or escalate to system administrator.

errorHandling.onAssignmentFail: Display error message and allow retry. If notification fails, log the failure, display error, and allow retry or escalate.

notification.message: You have a new screened-out intake assigned for closure.

steps.label: Supervisor Review of Screened-Out Intake
steps.description: Supervisor must review the assigned screened-out intake record for closure. The system must enforce access permissions so only authorized supervisors can access the record. Supervisor should verify rationale for screening out, ensure all documentation is complete, and close the intake record.

completionConditions.logic: Supervisor must manually review the screened-out intake record, confirm rationale and documentation, and close the record in the system. Task is complete when closure is recorded.

actions.name: Supervisor Review and Closure of Screened-Out Intake
actions.triggerCondition: Supervisor accesses assigned intake in STEP_10.
actions.implementation: Supervisor reviews assigned screened-out intake record, verifies rationale and documentation, and closes the intake record. On closure, mark task complete, log closure in audit trail, and notify intake worker of closure. If supervisor finds incomplete documentation or rationale, request more information from intake worker and log the request. If review or closure fails, display error and allow retry or escalate to system administrator.

errorHandling.onReviewFail: Display error message and allow retry. If supervisor requests more information, ensure notification is sent and intake is returned for correction. If notification fails, log the failure and escalate.

notification.message: Screened-out intake has been reviewed and closed. Intake worker notified of closure.

relationships.endNode: I have reviewed all information and confirm it is accurate to the best of my knowledge.
